title: Pringles Can
description: Adds Pringles cans as a junk-food item to Minecraft. Eat them for quick hunger, deal with low saturation, and recycle the empty cans into cardboard to craft more snacks. A silly snack loop with light eco-crafting!
body:
This mod adds Pringles cans as a new food item to Minecraft.

Pringles work like real-life junk food:

eating a can restores 5 hunger bars

but gives –1 saturation, so you’ll get hungry again sooner

When you finish a Pringles can, you don’t just throw it away. You receive empty cans, which can be recycled into cardboard. Cardboard is then used to craft more Pringles, creating a fun little snack loop.

Main features:

Pringles cans as edible food

Empty cans after eating

Recycle empty cans into 2 cardboard

Craft Pringles with 2 cardboard + 1 baked potato

Extra recipe: cardboard from 1 log + 1 paper

It’s a simple, light-hearted mod focused on junk food, recycling, and a goofy way to feed yourself in Minecraft.

Perfect for modpacks, survival worlds, or anyone who just wants Pringles in their game.
